channel.title: The Codex Arunel
channel.description: Recent content on The Codex Arunel

item.title: About
item.description: Hello, Osborn here. I am currently a student in Ghana, Africa. I have always loved exploring topics related to Computer Science, Physics and Electronics. I play football and chess as sports and also watch movies or read when i’m not busy. Email Me for whatever reason you might have and I will get to you as soon as I can.
